title: When clauses
subtitle: Connect time and action.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: When I get home, I make tea.
I called you when I arrived.
我到达时给你打了电话。
What do you do when you get home?
When I get home, I make tea and rest.
我到家后会泡茶并休息。

items.en: When I get home, I make tea.
I called you when I arrived.
items.zh: 我到达时给你打了电话。

items.en: What do you do when you get home?
When I get home, I make tea and rest.
items.zh: 我到家后会泡茶并休息。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What do you do when you get home?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: When I get home, I make tea and rest.
lines.zh: 我到家后会泡茶并休息。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I called you when I arrived.
lines.zh: 我到达时给你打了电话。

items.en: When I get home, I make tea.
I called you when I arrived.
items.zh: 我到达时给你打了电话。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
